project_context.primary_audience: African Students (Ivory Coast, Senegal, Mali, Burkina Faso)
project_context.developer_instructions: This is built as a mobile-first React web application. To enforce the mobile feel on desktop browsers, wrap the main router/app layout in a max-w-md centered container (e.g., `<div className="w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen shadow-2xl relative bg-slate-50 pb-20">`).

layout_and_spacing.container_wrapper: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50 pb-20 relative overflow-x-hidden

components.button: h-14 w-full rounded-xl font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-all
components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3
components.bottom_drawer: Use Shadcn Drawer component (vaul) for mobile-native interactions like cart summary and checkout. Overrides dialog on mobile.
components.bottom_navigation: Fixed at bottom (z-50), flex row items-center justify-around h-16 w-full max-w-md mx-auto glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-t border-slate-200)
components.locked_subject: Relative container. Base image uses CSS blur. Overlay with lock icon in absolute center. Price tag absolute top-right.

screens.country_selection: Grid of 4 cards. Flag images. Generates anonymous session ID on select.
screens.home_services: List of 4 services. Cards with distinct icons. WhatsApp deep link button.
screens.catalog: Horizontal scroll tabs for Series (A1, D, F1, etc). Vertical list of subjects. Add to Cart buttons.
screens.cart_checkout: Single column guest-checkout flow. Summary of items. Payment method radio group (Wave/Orange Money). Sticky bottom 'Pay' button.
screens.payment_pending: Large red 5:00 countdown timer. Instructions for transfer (*133# or number). Input for TXN ID.
screens.my_purchases: Grid of unlocked subjects. Clear unblurred images. Download PDF buttons.

animations.page_transition: Framer Motion: initial={{opacity: 0, x: 20}} animate={{opacity: 1, x: 0}} transition={{duration: 0.3}}
animations.tap_feedback: whileTap={{ scale: 0.96 }} on buttons and cards

testing_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
